rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ARSENY AND OLGA KOVSHAR PRIVATE CHARITABLE MEMORIAL FOUNDATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For The People Of The State Of Californias Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Petition To Confirm Raymond Fellman As Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: The motion is denied. Resolution of the standing question requires analysis of issues and facts beyond the face of the petition, including (i) whether the power of a trustee under section 7 of the Trust to appoint a successor "at any time" allows a resignation even after a vacancy in the office of trustee created by bankruptcy and, therefore, could constitute a "practical method" of appointment under Probate Code section 15660(b); and (ii) whether creation of a board and succession plan are within the trustee's power under section 6(m) to execute "all instruments necessary or proper for the accomplishment of the purposes" of the Trust without amending the Trust. Questions of trust interpretation as to which there are competing reasonable interpretations are not proper for resolution on a motion for judgment on the pleadings. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, January 26, 2016.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WALTER J HARRINGTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Erishka Harringtons Responses To Requests For Production And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Compel Responses to Requests for Production of Documents is granted. Within 20 days of the order, Erishka Harrington must supplement her production to Requests for Production Nos. 14-28 to include documents from January 1, 1994 to September 16, 2002. The respective requests for sanctions are denied. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Anyone choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/26/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
